calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Trusteeship
And Compel Disclosure Of Trust
Records 17200, 16060-16061

Petition To Confirm Trusteeship
And Compel Disclosure Of Trust
Records 17200, 16060-16061
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Continued To Oct-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerald Smith for Barry Abe (petitioner) (via zoom).
Michelle Domingo for and with Donna Fujii, Kayla Abe. (via zoom and in person).
Dale Yamashita appeared in person (pro per).


The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 30, 2026. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 7, 2026. The matter is continued to October 13, 2026 and the Parties are to return on October 13, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Petition to Confirm Trusteeship is also continued to that date.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
